item.title: Related Digital nears $16 billion financing for Oracle data center, Bloomberg News reports
item.description: Data center developer Related Digital is closing in on $16 billion of financing for a giant вҖӢOracle data center following months of negotiations with вҖҢinvestors, Bloomberg News reported on Wednesday.

item.title: Bank of Canada says it will rely on judgment more than usual for rate decisions
item.description: By Promit Mukherjee and David Ljunggren

item.title: SpaceX IPO buzz lifts aerospace shares on spillover bets
item.description: Shares of aerospace companies jumped on Wednesday as investors bet that Elon Musk-owned SpaceX's confidential filing for an initial public offering would be вҖӢa catalyst for the sector's next growth phase.

item.title: California, states seek $10.3 million for helping block Kroger-Albertsons merger
item.description: California and вҖӢa group of states are seeking $10.3 million in fees and costs вҖҢfor helping block the Kroger-Albertsons merger, a bid that would refill the state's coffers as it emerges as a major player in U.S. antitrust enforcement.

item.title: Exclusive: SpaceX will host analyst day on April 21, source says
item.description: Rocket company SpaceX вҖҢwill host an analyst day вҖӢon April вҖӢ21, and will offer вҒ analysts a вҖӢvisit to its "Macrohard" вҖӢxAI datacenter in Memphis, Tennessee two days вҖӢlater, a вҖӢsource familiar with the вҖҢmatter вҒ said on Wednesday.

item.title: US financial advisors brace for growing array of risks in second quarter
item.description: Investment advisors say a buildup of problems is weighing on clients, who are entering the вҖӢsecond quarter of the year struggling with trying to predict the outcome of war, the direction of energy prices and the repercussions of вҖҢproblems stemming from private credit.

item.title: Unilever CEO Fernandez returns to his roots with health and beauty makeover
item.description: As a senior Unilever executive in Brazil some 15 years ago, Fernando Fernandez made a bold gamble on hair care вҖӢand beauty, rapidly expanding the then newly acquired TRESemmГ© brand into a major money-spinner in the giant South American market.

item.title: Italian bill proposes curbs on social media addiction
item.description: Italian senators on Wednesday presented a draft law to tackle social media addiction that seeks to increase the responsibility вҖӢof online platforms for the way content is distributed to вҖҢusers.

item.title: Lilly's weight-loss pill wins US approval
item.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration on Wednesday вҖӢapproved Eli Lilly's weight-loss pill, making it the second to вҖҢmarket after Novo Nordisk's oral Wegovy, as the companies fight to capture more customers with the convenience of pills over injectables.

item.title: SpaceX's business and finances: rockets, satellite communications and budding AI
item.description: SpaceX is gearing up for a stock market debut that could value it at more than $1.75 trillion, as the Elon Musk-led company reaches for the stars in what could be the largest IPO in history.

item.title: Explainer: From filing to first trade: Inside the US IPO process
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX confidentially filed for what could be a record-breaking U.S. listing, Bloomberg News reported on Wednesday, spotlighting the multi-step process IPO hopefuls typically must navigate before their shares start trading.

item.title: Mega IPOs loom on Wall Street as Elon Musk's SpaceX confidentially files paperwork
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX has moved closer to going public with its confidential filing, Bloomberg News reported on Wednesday, as the billionaire's rocket-and-satellite company looks to вҖӢbeat OpenAI and Anthropic to the new listings market.

item.title: The road to SpaceX's juggernaut IPO
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX has confidentially filed for its hotly anticipated U.S. initial public offering, Bloomberg News reported on Wednesday, moving the billionaire closer to having a second publicly traded company in his empire.

item.title: SpaceX registers to take rocket maker public in blockbuster IPO, Bloomberg News reports
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX has confidentially filed for a U.S. initial public offering, setting the stage for what could become the largest stock market listing on record, Bloomberg News reported on Wednesday.

item.title: US Gulf Coast tanker market tightens as Asia seeks to replace lost supply
item.description: Oil tanker availability along the U.S. Gulf Coast has dropped sharply in вҖҢrecent weeks, as Asian and European refiners cut off from Middle Eastern supply have been snapping up vessels to import oil and fuel from the United States, shipping analysts and traders said.

item.title: Amazon's cloud business in Bahrain damaged in Iran strike, FT reports
item.description: Amazon's cloud computing operation in Bahrain was damaged after an Iranian strike, the вҖӢFinancial Times reported on Wednesday, citing a вҖҢperson familiar with the matter.

item.title: Iran war puts Middle East Dubai oil benchmark under stress as prices soar
item.description: The halting of oil exports through the Strait of Hormuz has left the Dubai Middle East benchmark, the price used to value nearly a fifth of global вҖӢcrude supply, in a perilous position.

item.title: Trump admin presents new plan to slash two thirds of consumer watchdog workforce
item.description: President Donald Trump's administration has developed a fresh plan to slash the workforce at the U.S. Consumer Financial Protection Bureau by about two вҖӢthirds, stepping back from earlier efforts to get rid of nearly вҖҢ90% of all employees, court documents showed.

item.title: US business inventories unexpectedly fall in January
item.description: U.S. business inventories unexpectedly fell in January amid a large decline in stocks вҖӢat wholesalers, suggesting inventory investment could вҖҢweigh on economic growth in the first quarter.

item.title: REalloys, U.S. Critical Materials sign MoU to build domestic rare earth supply chain
item.description: Rare earths developers REalloys and U.S. Critical Materials Corp have signed a memorandum of understanding вҖӢto build a fully domestic supply chain for вҖҢthe key materials in the U.S., in line with Washington's aims to reduce reliance on China.

item.title: Franklin Templeton to acquire CoinFund spinoff to expand crypto push
item.description: Investment manager Franklin Templeton said on Wednesday it had agreed вҖӢto acquire cryptocurrency investment unit 250 Digital, вҖҢspun out of venture firm CoinFund, as it steps up its expansion into digital assets.

item.title: US manufacturing sector grows in March; supplier delivery performance deteriorates
item.description: U.S. manufacturing activity picked up in March, though a measure of prices paid by factories for inputs jumped to the highest level in nearly four years and вҖӢsuppliers took longer to deliver material amid the war in the Middle East.

item.title: Peloton wins dismissal of lawsuit claiming it concealed bike rust that heralded big recall
item.description: A federal judge dismissed a lawsuit accusing Peloton Interactive of intentionally concealing quality control and safety вҖӢproblems with its exercise bikes, including allegations it told вҖҢfactory workers to cover up rust on seat frames prior to shipping, leading to a costly recall and a declining share price.

item.title: Kia to sell lower-priced electric vehicle in US
item.description: Kia said Wednesday it вҖӢwill begin selling вҖҢa lower-priced electric vehicle in the United States вҖӢlater this year вҖӢas automakers work to вҒ recharge EV sales.

item.title: McCormick bets on flavor in $65 billion Unilever tie-up amid shifting tastes
item.description: McCormick's merger with Unilever's food business to create a $65 billion sauce-and-spice giant is a bet that access to rising global demand for flavor-rich, healthier food can help counter a maturing U.S. market.

item.title: Intel to buy back Apollo stake in Ireland factory for $14.2 billion
item.description: Intel said it would spend $14.2 billion to buy back the 49% stake it sold to Apollo Global Management in вҖӢits Ireland manufacturing facility, taking full ownership of the вҖҢplant as its finances improve and AI drives demand for its processors.

item.title: US retail sales increase solidly in February
item.description: U.S. retail sales increased solidly in February as motor vehicle purchases rebounded and temperatures warmed up, but surging gasoline prices because вҖӢof war in the Middle East could crimp spending вҖҢin the months ahead.

item.title: Rare disease advocacy group urges Trump administration to restore FDA clarity
item.description: A rare disease advocacy coalition on Wednesday urged the вҖҢTrump administration to restore regulatory clarity as it considers new leadership at the U.S. Food and Drug Administration's Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research.

item.title: Hasbro investigates cybersecurity incident, takes some systems offline
item.description: Toymaker Hasbro said on Wednesday it вҖӢwas investigating a cybersecurity incident вҖҢafter identifying unauthorized access to its network on March 28, with вҖӢhelp from third-party cybersecurity вҖӢprofessionals.

item.title: US private payrolls increase steadily in March, ADP says
item.description: U.S. private payrolls increased steadily in March, the ADP's national employment report вҖӢshowed on Wednesday.
